app.title: TrailStats
app.disclaimer: TrailStats is not affiliated with or endorsed by Strava, Inc. or Garmin Ltd. "Strava" and "Garmin" are trademarks of their respective owners.

upload.dropzone: Drop your export ZIP here, or click to browse — Strava, Garmin and more
upload.purgeConfirm: Remove your stored activities from this browser? This cannot be undone.

error.invalidZip: This doesn't look like a supported export. Make sure it's the full ZIP you downloaded from Strava, Garmin or another supported platform.
error.noActivities: Couldn't find activities in this export.
error.clearFailed: Couldn't delete your stored activities. Try again or clear this site's data from your browser settings.

upload.discarded: {{count}} rows could not be read and were skipped.

racePredictor.title: Race predictor
racePredictor.subtitle: Based on your best effort at {{base}}

paceZones.title: Pace zone distribution
paceZones.noData: At least 5 running activities are needed to compute pace zones.

fitness.title: Fitness & freshness
fitness.chartAlt: Chart of fitness (CTL), fatigue (ATL) and form (TSB) over time.

trends.title: Trends
trends.chartAlt: Distance trend chart. Use the button below to view the data as a table.
trends.yearOverYearAlt: Distance comparison between {{current}} and {{previous}}, aligned by period.

breakdown.title: Distance by activity type
breakdown.chartAlt: Donut chart showing the share of total distance per activity type. Use the button below to view the data as a table.

eddington.title: Eddington number
eddington.next_one: {{remaining}} more activity of ≥ {{target}} km to reach {{target}}
eddington.next_other: {{remaining}} more activities of ≥ {{target}} km to reach {{target}}
eddington.noData: Not enough activities yet to compute an Eddington number.

pace.title: Pace evolution
pace.chartAlt: Monthly average running pace chart. Lower is faster. Use the button below to view the data as a table.

load.title: Weekly training load
load.barLabel: Training load index versus your 6-week baseline
load.caption: This week {{current}} vs {{baseline}} avg load units
load.notEnoughHistory: Need at least 3 weeks of activity to estimate training load.

privacy.note: Everything runs in your browser. Your data never leaves this device.
privacy.heading: Your data stays with you

points.local: Your export is read and analyzed entirely inside this browser tab.
points.noServer: Nothing is uploaded — there is no server and no account. Your activities are cached in your browser's local storage for convenience, and you can delete them at any time.
points.noTracking: No tracking, no cookies, no analytics. We never see your activities.

privacy.clearData: Delete my stored activities from this browser
privacy.verify: Don't take our word for it: open your browser's developer tools, go to the Network tab, and load a file — you'll see no data ever leaves your device.

demo.bannerText: You're exploring TrailStats with fictional sample data. Exit to analyze your own export.

disclaimer.estimatesOnly: Estimates for informational purposes only. Not medical or sports advice.
